name: Vector Scare Archfiend
name_jp: ベクター・スケア・デーモン
desc:
2+ Cyberse monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Tribute 1 monster that this card points to; Special Summon that destroyed monster to any zone this card points to. If you Special Summon to your opponent's field by this effect, this card can make a second attack during this Battle Phase (although your opponent gains control of that Special Summoned monster).
mnst_eff:

If you Special Summon to your opponent's field by this effect, this card can make a second attack during this Battle Phase (although your opponent gains control of that Special Summoned monster).

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
